#+title: Noodly Appendage imagery

A linked note about the Noodly Appendage. References [[id:11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111]] and includes
literature notes on the pasta metaphor.

* Origins
:PROPERTIES:
:CUSTOM_ID: origins
:END:

<<origins>> The pasta metaphor appears in modern secular scripture.

* Related

[[id:11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111]] is the canonical canticle. The unlinked-references
tool should also pick up "The Noodly Psalm" — an alias for that node.
